commands.name: batch

options.name: --allowed-tools
options.description:
Default allowed (or disallowed) tools for tasks that
don't specify them. Can be specified multiple times

options.name: --azdo-pat
options.description:
Azure DevOps PAT (overrides AZURE_DEVOPS_PAT
environment variable)

options.name: --budget
options.description:
Maximum total budget in USD across all tasks (0 = no
limit)

options.name: --claude-api-key
options.description:
Anthropic API key (sets ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude
API authentication)

options.name: --claude-code-oauth-token
options.description:
Claude Code OAuth token (sets
CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN)

options.name: --max-retries
options.description:
Default maximum retry attempts on rate limit (per
task)

options.name: --no-dashboard
options.description:
Disable the live dashboard and show raw output
instead

options.name: --ongoing
options.description: Keep running in a heartbeat loop after completion

options.name: --ongoing-wait
options.description: Minutes to wait between heartbeat runs (default 5)

options.name: --output-json
options.description: Write a JSON session report to this file path

options.name: --permission
options.description:
Default permission: omit for auto; 'unsafe'
for --dangerously-skip-permissions

options.name: --stream-verbose
options.description:
Include stream-json event type lines (event: user,
event: assistant, …) in live output

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Default task timeout in minutes (0 = no timeout,
default 30)

options.name: --working-dir
options.description:
Default working directory for tasks that don't
specify one

arguments.name: tasks-file
arguments.description: Path to the batch tasks JSON file

commands.description:
Run multiple tasks from a JSON file with shared budget 
tracking

commands.name: boards

options.name: --allowed-tools
options.description: Allowed tools (repeatable)

options.name: --azdo-pat
options.description:
Azure DevOps PAT (overrides AZURE_DEVOPS_PAT
environment variable)

options.name: --budget
options.description:
Maximum budget in USD for all work items combined (0 =
no limit)

options.name: --claude-api-key
options.description:
Anthropic API key (sets ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude
API authentication)

options.name: --claude-code-oauth-token
options.description:
Claude Code OAuth token (sets
CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN)

options.name: --max-retries
options.description: Maximum retry attempts per work item on rate limit

options.name: --max-turns
options.description: Maximum agentic turns per work item

options.name: --model
options.description: Claude model to use

options.name: --no-dashboard
options.description: Disable the live dashboard and use classic output

options.name: --ongoing
options.description: Keep running in a heartbeat loop after completion

options.name: --ongoing-wait
options.description: Minutes to wait between heartbeat runs (default 5)

options.name: --permission
options.description:
Claude permission: omit for auto; 'unsafe'
for --dangerously-skip-permissions

options.name: --stream-verbose
options.description:
Include stream-json event type lines (event: user,
event: assistant, …) in live output

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Task timeout in minutes (0 = no timeout, default 30).
Overridden by 'LongRunning' tag on work items.

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: Working directory (target repo root)

arguments.name: project-url
arguments.description:
Azure DevOps project URL (e.g. 
https://dev.azure.com/org/project). Finds all Epics tagged 
'Agentic'.

commands.description:
Find Agentic-tagged epics in an Azure DevOps project, 
clone repos as needed, and run Claude on approved work items

commands.name: run

options.name: --allowed-tools
options.description:
Allowed (or disallowed) tools, actions, and commands.
Can be specified multiple times (e.g. --allowed-tools "Bash(git:*)"
--allowed-tools "Edit")

options.name: --azdo-pat
options.description:
Azure DevOps PAT (overrides AZURE_DEVOPS_PAT
environment variable)

options.name: --budget
options.description: Maximum budget in USD (0 = no limit)

options.name: --claude-api-key
options.description:
Anthropic API key (sets ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for Claude
API authentication)

options.name: --claude-code-oauth-token
options.description:
Claude Code OAuth token (sets
CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN)

options.name: --max-retries
options.description: Maximum retry attempts on rate limit

options.name: --max-turns
options.description: Maximum number of agentic turns

options.name: --model
options.description: Claude model to use (e.g. sonnet, opus)

options.name: --ongoing
options.description: Keep running in a heartbeat loop after completion

options.name: --ongoing-wait
options.description: Minutes to wait between heartbeat runs (default 5)

options.name: --output-json
options.description: Write a JSON session report to this file path

options.name: --permission
options.description:
Claude permission mode: omit for auto
(--permission-mode auto); use 'unsafe' for
--dangerously-skip-permissions

options.name: --stream-verbose
options.description:
Include stream-json event type lines (event: user,
event: assistant, …) in live output

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Task timeout in minutes (0 = no timeout, default 30)

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: Working directory for Claude

arguments.name: prompt
arguments.description: The prompt to send to Claude

commands.description:
Run a single prompt through Claude Code with budget 
tracking and rate limit handling
